name: multiscale-overlays
description: Penumbra ADR 0014 — multiscale diagnostic overlays on the Multi-Field scene. One fixture per overlay (intervalWidthHeatmap, brickThinFeatures, cascadeMismatch, curvature, adfError, subBrickPreview) plus one fixture exercising sub-brick refinement end-to-end. Pixel-diff baselines approved on the first run. The overlays are decoupled from SDF rendering — toggling them changes only the wireframe pass, never the SDF output.
